title: Allergy Verification Dependency Unresolved Before Medication Execution
scenario: A medication order depends on allergy verification, but allergy status cannot be confirmed before administration.
initial_state: The medication workflow was authorized assuming allergy verification would be completed.
state_transition: Allergy verification remains unresolved at execution time.
execution_boundary: Medication administration is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstruction of allergy dependency state when allergy status is safety-critical.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because allergy verification remains unresolved.
proof_conclusion: Medication execution must fail closed when allergy verification dependencies cannot be satisfied.
clinical_action: Administer medication with unresolved allergy verification
